topPlaces.name: Kalsubai
topPlaces.description: Kalsubai is a mountain in the Western Ghats, located in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Kalsubai is the highest peak in Maharashtra and is located in Ahilyanagar district in Akole Taluka.

items.note: Kalsubai is a mountain in the Western Ghats, located in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Kalsubai is the highest peak in Maharashtra and is located in Ahilyanagar district in Akole Taluka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bitangad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bitangad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (33 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bitangad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bitangad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bitangad?
faq.a: Stays in Bitangad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
